title: Section 7
content: 1[(1)] The Central Government may appoint one or more Commissioners of Metro Railway Safety. 2[(2) The Commissioner shall function under the administrative control of the Chief Commissioner of Railway Safety appointed under section 5 of the Railways Act, 1989 (24 of 1989).]
footnote: 1. S. 7 renumbered as sub-section (1) thereof by s. 9, ibid. (w.e.f. 7-9-2009). 2. Ins. by s. 9, ibid. (w. e. f. 7-9-2009).
